title: Economic methodology
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — positive vs normative, ceteris paribus, and economic models.
learningObjectives: Describe the role of economic models.

simpleExplanation.title: How economists think
simpleExplanation.summary: Economics uses simplified models to explain behaviour. Statements must be classified as testable facts or value judgements.
steps: Positive: can be tested with data.

sections.content: **Economic methodology** (1.2) underpins every essay. Label statements **positive or normative** before evaluating policy.
